description: Queen Patch 6 (4 March 2020) — Alliance Rejoin Cooldown Changes, Knockdown Loot Loss Changes, Respawn Penalty in Hideouts, Travel Cost Modifier Changes, Elite Dungeon Changes, Other Changes, Fixes.

sections.heading: Alliance Rejoin Cooldown Changes

items.text: Patch 5 introduced a 3-day cooldown for leaving and rejoining the same alliance. (This existed alongside the 7-day cooldown on joining a new alliance that was already in the game.)
With today's patch, the duration of this cooldown has been updated

sections.searchable_text: Alliance Rejoin Cooldown Changes Patch 5 introduced a 3-day cooldown for leaving and rejoining the same alliance. (This existed alongside the 7-day cooldown on joining a new alliance that was already in the game.) With today's patch, the duration of this cooldown has been updated Alliance Rejoin Cooldown: 3 Days → 7 Days

sections.heading: Knockdown Loot Loss Changes

subsections.heading: knockdown.

items.text: Items with durability: 5% durability loss
Items without durability: 10% destruction chance
Items with durability: 5% durability loss (no change)
Items without durability: immune to destruction

subsections.searchable_text: knockdown. Items with durability: 5% durability loss Items without durability: 10% destruction chance Items with durability: 5% durability loss (no change) Items without durability: immune to destruction

sections.searchable_text: Knockdown Loot Loss Changes knockdown. Items with durability: 5% durability loss Items without durability: 10% destruction chance Items with durability: 5% durability loss (no change) Items without durability: immune to destruction Elite Dungeons death

sections.heading: Respawn Penalty in Hideouts

items.text: First Respawn: no penalty
Second Respawn: 30 seconds
Third Respawn: 60 seconds
Fourth Respawn: 120 seconds
Fifth Respawn or more: 240 seconds

sections.searchable_text: Respawn Penalty in Hideouts First Respawn: no penalty Second Respawn: 30 seconds Third Respawn: 60 seconds Fourth Respawn: 120 seconds Fifth Respawn or more: 240 seconds

sections.heading: Travel Cost Modifier Changes

items.text: Adjusted travel cost modifiers for resources, laborer journals, and luxury goods
In most cases these were reduced by half, in the case of some T2 journals these were slightly increased
This will also result in a significant overall reduction to recovery costs for these items from Hideouts
Please note that this is only a first step in reviewing fast travel cost modifiers - we will continue to review these costs, and may adjust them further in future patches

sections.searchable_text: Travel Cost Modifier Changes Adjusted travel cost modifiers for resources, laborer journals, and luxury goods In most cases these were reduced by half, in the case of some T2 journals these were slightly increased This will also result in a significant overall reduction to recovery costs for these items from Hideouts Please note that this is only a first step in reviewing fast travel cost modifiers - we will continue to review these costs, and may adjust them further in future patches

sections.heading: Elite Dungeon Changes

items.text: Avalonian Artifacts

subitems.text: All Avalonian boss chests now have a chance to give Avalonian Artifacts
Slightly lowered rate of Avalonian Artifacts received from final boss (Sir Bedivere)
Overall, this means that the drop rate of Avalonian Artifacts for any given dungeon will be approximately twice what it was before

items.text: Health and damage of all Avalonian enemies reduced by 14%

sections.searchable_text: Elite Dungeon Changes Avalonian Artifacts All Avalonian boss chests now have a chance to give Avalonian Artifacts Slightly lowered rate of Avalonian Artifacts received from final boss (Sir Bedivere) Overall, this means that the drop rate of Avalonian Artifacts for any given dungeon will be approximately twice what it was before Health and damage of all Avalonian enemies reduced by 14%

sections.heading: Other Changes

items.text: Players can now join the Smart Cluster Queue while mounted
Changed visibility of Steelplate Cougar from "hidden" to "locked" in mount skins UI

sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Players can now join the Smart Cluster Queue while mounted Changed visibility of Steelplate Cougar from "hidden" to "locked" in mount skins UI

sections.heading: Fixes

items.text: Hellgate final boss / chest notification now correctly displays 1-minute countdown
Fixed an issue where characters from other guilds in the friends list would sometimes display incorrect avatar, avatar ring, and "last seen" duration
Fixed an issue where Shoes of Tenacity (Avalonian Leather Armor) spell "Blind Spot" would deal damage twice when used with Spinning Blades
Undead Governor (Undead Randomized Dungeon Boss): Hitbox of Spinning Skull area has been corrected, and the spell now applies spell immunity to the correct target
Additional minor graphical, terrain, animation, UI, audio, and localization fixes
